description: Validates that the named tag is present on every resource group. The require-tag-* policies run in Indexed mode, which excludes resource groups — but resource groups are the source the inherit-tag policy copies from, so the taxonomy must be enforced there too. The tag name is parameterized so the initiative can instantiate this policy once per required tag.

metadata.description: Audit, Deny, or Disabled. Defaults to Audit per ADR 0008.
